area.value: one living creature with 5 or fewer HD

description.value: The affected creature becomes frightened. If the subject succeeds on a Will save, it is shaken for 1 round. Creatures with 6 or more HD are immune to this effect. Cause fear counters and dispels remove fear. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
